goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'the varsity restaurant'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '7 people' at '11:30' on 'wednesday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'london liverpool street' and should 'arrive by 20:30'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'thursday'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 'the same group of people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called the varsity restaurant
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 7 people at 11:30 on wednesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to london liverpool street and should arrive by 20:30
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on thursday
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
